side_effects.description: Vomited once on Monday, then nausea and vomiting again on Wednesday shortly after injection; suspected copper toxicity but later attributed to not eating in the morning before taking vitamins

protocol_notes: OP also takes a men's multivitamin daily containing zinc. Initially suspected copper toxicity but later reconsidered, attributing symptoms to taking vitamins on an empty stomach. Commenters confirmed copper content in 3mg GHK-Cu is far below toxic thresholds.
